overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing a female character jogging through an abandoned desert industrial complex or airfield. The character moves steadily across cracked pavement and dirt terrain past various warehouse buildings, power lines, and distant mountains under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert industrial approach with cracked pavement

agents.ego_description: character jogging steadily across cracked pavement toward distant industrial buildings

entered.detail: extensive cracked asphalt and salt-stained pavement covering the ground
tall metal electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines
small single-story beige administrative buildings in the distance
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character moves across a wide-open desert industrial area with cracked pavement underfoot. Power transmission towers and small beige buildings stand in the distance against a backdrop of mountains. The scene is completely empty with bright direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: aircraft hangar or large warehouse exterior

events.description: large gray industrial hangar building comes into view on the right side

entered.detail: long industrial building with multiple large garage doors and gray metal siding
small rectangular outbuilding with flat roof

segments.scene_description: The character passes a large gray industrial hangar with multiple bay doors on the right. The cracked pavement continues underfoot while the power lines shift to the left side of the frame. The environment remains an empty desert industrial complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: perimeter area with scattered trees and utility buildings

events.description: ground surface transitions from cracked pavement to dirt and gravel

agents.ego_description: character jogging past a beige office building and cluster of green trees on the left

group of leafy green trees providing sparse shade
long low industrial warehouse with brown corrugated metal siding

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to dirt and gravel as the character passes a beige building on the right and approaches a cluster of green trees on the left. A large brown warehouse becomes visible in the distance ahead, replacing the gray hangar in the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse district with multiple industrial structures

agents.ego_description: character continuing through the industrial complex toward large warehouse buildings

entered.detail: tall metal lattice tower with power lines running across the scene

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the warehouse district, passing the trees and beige building behind. A large brown warehouse dominates the left side of the frame while a power transmission tower stands prominently in the center. The ground remains dry dirt and gravel throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an abandoned desert industrial complex that shifts from wide-open paved areas to a denser district of warehouses and dirt terrain. It begins with the character jogging across wide, cracked pavement under bright sunlight, with distant power towers and beige buildings set against a mountain backdrop. As the camera moves forward, the scene transitions past a large gray industrial hangar with multiple bay doors on the right while the power lines shift toward the left. The terrain then shifts from pavement to dry dirt and gravel as the character passes a beige building and a cluster of green trees, bringing a large brown warehouse into view ahead. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the warehouse district, where the brown building dominates the left side of the frame and a prominent power transmission tower stands centered in the arid landscape.
